{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221942507D00D509AB68BD2AF01C"}"},"total":3947},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7003874099759973155","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本美食小说可以说我见到过写的最好的。主角不像其他美食小说一样板个臭脸，别人来你这吃饭像欠你钱一样。可以看出作者是对美食有一定的了解。并且跟别人比试厨艺的时候也会承认是用了大唐没有的佐料。开的店面按照现在来说是高档餐厅，但也会推出平民也能消费的起的小吃。这一点在我看来就比其他美食小说更有人情味。会为他人考虑，不会觉得老子天下第一。我喜欢这样的主角。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1630716517,"group_id":"6981637658552306701","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9YOuxq4uNzMmtDssKDvbOAmclKq/tWSMYJkg+Ya0lJo","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4463617870405292","user_name":"高深莫测的阿恺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4463617870405292","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1759970888,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6981637658552306701","book_info":{"abstract":"尹煊穿越大唐贞观七年成为一家酒馆的老板，觉醒诸天美食系统，从此他的生活完全转变了。一份番茄炒蛋让程咬金父子三人赞不绝口，一碗酒令李世民酩酊大醉，他的每一道菜品都能席卷大唐的风向标。
程咬金：小兄弟，咱哥俩能拜把子不，不求同生但求共死。
李世民：掌柜的，你缺娘子不缺？我送你两个公主如何。
长乐公主：老板，你那个油炸火腿还能再送我一根吗。
兰陵公主：煊哥哥，偷偷告诉你，我姐她疯了要招你过门。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eb9a81755d0a6357bfedcb3d59e07e40","author":"幸福的爬爬虫","author_id":"","book_id":"6981637658552306701","book_name":"厨师的我，竟是李二的女婿","book_short_name":"大唐批发商","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":73,"name":"大唐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=73&name=大唐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6981640218277315103","read_count":"24872","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2040015"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1001","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,大唐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2875958eb53f357bbe9ebf600ace9b49~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363770&x-signature=kCTeU2XEzkXZH3Ami%2FRIy413HrY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1925980343248839","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.0013865e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221942507D00D509AB68BD2AF01C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":102,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30013,"reply_count":26,"show_pv":157045},"user_action":{"a
